_doc: Sup-pratyaya inventory in raw upadeśa form (SLP1). Each key is (vibhakti, vacana) stringified as 'v-c'. Values: the SLP1 sequence WITH it-markers present (engine's 1.3.2–1.3.9 will remove them). Anunāsika marker: '~' suffix on a vowel. The 'has_halant_it' set (in the _meta block) lists keys whose pratyaya ends in a halant-it that 1.3.3 must strip.
